testcase.name: test_create_request_then_verify_smoke
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration5_auth.py:238: in test_create_request_then_verify_smoke assert r.status_code in (200, 201), r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","client_age"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_iter5_user","email":"TEST_iter5_smoke@example.com","phone":"208-555-0100","age":30,"state":"ID","city":"Boise","presenting_issues":"anxiety, mild depression","preferred_modality":"telehealth","payment_type":"cash","cash_budget":150,"consent":true},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","location_state"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_iter5_user","email":"TEST_iter5_smoke@example.com","phone":"208-555-0100","age":30,"state":"ID","city":"Boise","presenting_issues":"anxiety, mild depression","preferred_modality":"telehealth","payment_type":"cash","cash_budget":150,"consent":true},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
